diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -34,7 +34,12 @@
     def forward(self, input_values, attention_mask=None):

         outputs = self.encoder(input_values, attention_mask=attention_mask)

         hidden_states = outputs.last_hidden_state

-        pooled = self.pooling(hidden_states, attention_mask)

+        feature_mask = None

+        if attention_mask is not None:

+            feature_mask = self.encoder._get_feature_vector_attention_mask(

+                hidden_states.shape[1], attention_mask

+            )

+        pooled = self.pooling(hidden_states, feature_mask)

         logits = self.classifier(pooled)

         return logits.squeeze(-1)

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -14,7 +14,7 @@
 

 torch.backends.cudnn.benchmark = True

 

-RAB_ITERATION = os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION', '14')

+RAB_ITERATION = os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION', '15')

 log_dir = f"logs/iter_{RAB_ITERATION}"

 os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)

 

@@ -82,19 +82,19 @@
 train_dataset = ASVspoofDataset(data_dir, train_protocol, subset='train')

 dev_dataset = ASVspoofDataset(data_dir, dev_protocol, subset='dev')

 

-batch_size_train = 16

-batch_size_dev = 64

-train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=batch_size_train, shuffle=True, num_workers=8, collate_fn=collate_fn, pin_memory=True)

+batch_size_train = 32

+batch_size_dev = 128

+train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=batch_size_train, shuffle=True, num_workers=8, collate_fn=collate_fn, pin_memory=True, drop_last=True)

 dev_loader = DataLoader(dev_dataset, batch_size=batch_size_dev, shuffle=False, num_workers=8, collate_fn=collate_fn, pin_memory=True)

 

 model = SpoofDetector(pretrained_model=pretrained_name)

 device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

 model.to(device)

-optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=3e-6, weight_decay=1e-2)

+optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=3e-6, weight_decay=5e-3)

 criterion = nn.BCEWithLogitsLoss()

-scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=6, eta_min=1e-7)

+scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=5, eta_min=1e-7)

 

-num_epochs = 6

+num_epochs = 5

 best_eer = float('inf')

 best_path = 'checkpoints/best.pt'

 os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)

@@ -122,20 +122,19 @@
             labels = labels.to(device)

             attn_mask = attn_mask.to(device)

             outputs = model(inputs, attn_mask)

-            all_scores.append(outputs.cpu())

-            all_labels.append(labels.cpu())

-    all_scores = torch.cat(all_scores).numpy()

-    all_labels = torch.cat(all_labels).numpy()

+            all_scores.extend(outputs.cpu().float().tolist())

+            all_labels.extend(labels.cpu().float().tolist())

     dev_eer = compute_eer(all_labels, all_scores)

-    print(f'Epoch {epoch+1}: train_loss={avg_train_loss:.5f}, dev_eer={dev_eer:.5f}')

+    scheduler.step()

     with open(os.path.join(log_dir, 'metrics.jsonl'), 'a') as f:

-        f.write(json.dumps({'epoch': epoch+1, 'train_loss': avg_train_loss, 'dev_eer': dev_eer}) + '\n')

-    scheduler.step()

+        f.write(json.dumps({"epoch": epoch, "train_loss": avg_train_loss, "dev_eer": dev_eer}) + '\n')

     if dev_eer < best_eer:

         best_eer = dev_eer

         torch.save({

             'model_state_dict': model.state_dict(),

             'pretrained_model': pretrained_name

         }, best_path)

-        print(f'New best EER {best_eer:.5f} at epoch {epoch+1}')

+        print(f'New best EER {best_eer:.5f} at epoch {epoch}')

+    else:

+        print(f'Epoch {epoch}: train_loss={avg_train_loss:.5f}, dev_eer={dev_eer:.5f}')

 print('Training completed. Best checkpoint saved at checkpoints/best.pt')
